title: Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles Silhouette - Ivory with Print - Pack of 4-13 x 7 cm - Long Burning Time 60 hours - Household Candle - Includes Natural Vegan Wax - Without Palm Oil
availability_text: Only 13 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Natural candlelight creates a warm, welcoming atmosphere in your home. The bolsius Soft Pearl Rustic Pillar Candle has an ivory white base colour with a fir tree pattern making it perfect for the Christmas season. The candle is 13cm tall and has a burn time of up to 60 hours. Made with natural vegan wax and palm oil free.

The soft pearl colour of the Rustic Special candle from bolsius is a subtle ivory white inspired by the delicate nuances of pearls. With its festive fir tree pattern, this candle is a wonderful addition to your interior.

Quality candles can be recognised by a long burning time, and they also retain their shape when removed. The bolsius Rustic Candle Special in natural colours is decorated with festive design. Made with respect for man and planet. No palm oil, with natural vegetable wax. The braided cotton wick ensures a permanently stable flame.

The wonderful "Special" collection combines rustic candles with festive prints, a sparkling metallic finish or an attractive gradient. They are offered in a range of sizes and designs that are complemented each season according to the latest trends. Inspired by the textures and colours of nature. Made with natural vegan wax made from olive oil, sunflower oil or rapeseed oil and palm oil free.

Since 1870, bolsius has been producing high-quality candles and fragrances with which you can create an atmosphere of cosiness and well-being in your home. We do this with passion, know-how and with respect for people and planet. bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that excite your senses. Make every moment special. For you, and for everyone around you.
description: Product Description Natural candlelight creates a warm, welcoming atmosphere in your home. The bolsius Soft Pearl Rustic Pillar Candle has an ivory white base colour with a fir tree pattern making it perfect for the Christmas season. The candle is 13cm tall and has a burn time of up to 60 hours. Made with natural vegan wax and palm oil free. Safety Warning Place the product in a safe place, away from flammable materials and protected from direct sunlight. Use a sturdy coaster or candle plate and ensure that the candle cannot tip over. For a candle arrangement with multiple candles, make sure they have a minimum distance of 10 cm apart so that they do not deform due to the heat. Pull the wick straight and upright before lighting it and use a candle snuffer to extinguish. This prevents unsightly wax splashes.

specifications_table.Occasion: Birthday, Christmas, Easter, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day
